title: Refactor an if-chain on user.role into pattern-matched function heads
prompt: Rewrite this: `def homepage(user) do if user.role == "admin", do: "/admin", else: if user.role == "editor", do: "/editor", else: "/" end end`. Use three function heads, each pattern-matching on `%{role: ...}`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Router do ... end`.
